zh.lifeSummary: 當Philipe Walshingham於大約1420年出生在英國肯特斯勒爾斯特時，她的父親Thomas Walsingham26歲，母親Margaret Bamme23歲。她於大約1440年與Thomas Ballard of Charth在英國肯特斯勒爾斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1465年8月18日在英國英格蘭肯特享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philipe Walshingham于大约1420年出生在英国肯特斯勒爾斯特时，她的父亲Thomas Walsingham26岁，母亲Margaret Bamme23岁。她于大约1440年与Thomas Ballard of Charth在英国肯特斯勒爾斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1465年8月18日在英国英格兰肯特享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Walshingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great or Little Walsingham in Norfolk. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wæls + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + hām ‘village, homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Philipe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Philipe Walshingham was born about 1420, in Chislehurst, Kent, England, her father, Thomas Walsingham, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Bamme, was 23. She married Thomas Ballard of Charth about 1440, in Chislehurst, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 18 August 1465, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philipe Walshingham est née environ 1420, à Chislehurst, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Walsingham, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bamme, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Ballard of Charth environ 1440, à Chislehurst, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 18 août 1465, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philipe Walshingham um 1420 in Chislehurst, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Walsingham 26 und ihre Mutter Margaret Bamme 23. Sie hat um 1440 in Chislehurst, Kent, England Thomas Ballard of Charth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 18. August 1465 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philipe Walshingham è nata il circa 1420 nel Chislehurst, Kent, England, sua padre, Thomas Walsingham, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Margaret Bamme, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Ballard of Charth circa 1440, nel Chislehurst, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 18 agosto 1465, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philipe Walshinghamが約1420年にイギリスケントチスレハルストで生まれた時，父Thomas Walsinghamは26歳，母Margaret Bammeは23歳であった。約1440年にイギリスケントチスレハルストでThomas Ballard of Charthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1465年8月18日にイギリスイギリスケントで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philipe Walshingham(이)가 대략 1420년 영국 켄트 치슬레후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Walsingham(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Bamme(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1440년 영국 켄트 치슬레후르스트에서 Thomas Ballard of Charth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 8월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philipe Walshingham nasceu aproximadamente 1420, em Chislehurst, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Walsingham, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bamme, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Ballard of Charth aproximadamente 1440, em Chislehurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1465, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philipe Walshingham родилась около 1420 г. в местности числэурст, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Walsingham было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bamme, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Ballard of Charth около 1440 г. в местности числэурст, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 18 августа 1465 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philipe Walshingham nació aproximadamente 1420, en Chislehurst, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Walsingham, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Bamme, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Thomas Ballard of Charth aproximadamente 1440, en Chislehurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1465, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
